title: Pork Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious stir fry recipe made with pork and a selection of vegetables.
instructions: Heat the wok or a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the vegetable oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the pork and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced ginger and minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the sliced bitter melon and cook until it starts to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for another minute.
